en.extract:
The blue-whiskered tanager (Tangara johannae) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in the Chocó of Colombia and Ecuador. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''blue-whiskered tanager''' ('''''Tangara johannae''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]]. It is found in the [[Tumbes-Chocó-Magdalena|Chocó]] of [[Colombia]] and [[Ecuador]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
